refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs targeting key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency and task execution) allows clearer design focus and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure actual productivity (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and compare against the customer-defined target; verify sub-FRs by monitoring equipment utilization rates and task completion times.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize productive output.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to minimize delays and idle time.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize operational efficiency.
DP2: Implement task scheduling and coordination system to optimize task execution.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both operational and task execution efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling modules.
Data exchange via telemetry and tasking interfaces.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are logically coupled but can be modularized with clear interface definitions to minimize coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable telemetry and tasking data exchange.
Risk of suboptimal coordination if interfaces are poorly defined or delayed.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure interface protocols between vehicle control and task scheduling are robust and latency-tolerant.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level integration of vehicle control and task scheduling to achieve productivity targets.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Exchange of vehicle status and operational data between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Task assignments and status updates between NGHE Solution and Teleoperation.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication backbone supporting data exchange among modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: Central integration module containing DP1 and DP2 logic; low diffusion risk.
Contains physical vehicle control but limited task scheduling logic.
Primarily operator interface; less suitable for core productivity logic.
Focused on safety alerts; minimal relevance to productivity DP containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing productivity-related DP logic in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module if too many functions are centralized.
Interface latency or failures could impact productivity performance.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modular sub-packaging within NGHE Solution to manage complexity; ensure robust interface error handling.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are clearly addressed by selected DPs with logical mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Centralizing DP logic in NGHE Solution reduces diffusion risk but requires careful complexity management.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as best ownership candidate; interfaces are well-defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via system-level productivity metrics and interface data monitoring.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Refine interface protocols for latency and error handling.
Plan for modular decomposition within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

decision.justification: Current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet criteria with manageable risks and clear verification paths.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize productive output.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to minimize delays and idle time.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Reliable telemetry and tasking data exchange.
open_risks: Complexity management within NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype or simulation showing productivity target achievement.
Interface latency and error rate measurements.
